KEY: D minor | METER: 4/4 | TEMPO: 134 | GRID: 64th (adaptive) | BARS: 125
VOICES: SYN BASS 1[prog=38], SAW WAVE[prog=81], VOICE OOHS[prog=53], SAW WAVE#2[prog=81], SAW WAVE#3[prog=81], A.PIANO 3[prog=2], REVERSCYMB[prog=119], DRUMS[drums]
